evidence.q1: Sections numbered 1–18 sequentially; cross‑reference in Section 18 to Sections 13, 14, 16 resolves correctly.
evidence.q2: Defined terms (Customer Data, Deliverables, Vendor Methods, Security Incident) appear only in Section 2 and are used consistently, e.g. 'Customer Data' in Section 5.
evidence.q3: All time/quantity references are commercial and specific (72 hours, 45 days, 30 days, one year, 1% per month); no 'reasonable while' or similar vague phrasing.
evidence.q4: No archaic diction (no 'heretofore', 'witnesseth', 'said', etc.); the document uses modern commercial wording throughout.
evidence.q5: All sentences are grammatically complete and internally consistent; the duplicated 'normalization' is a minor typo but not grammatically broken.
evidence.q6: Register is uniform: all sections employ 'Vendor will'/'Customer will', capitalized definitions, and consistent modern contractual phrasing.
